symbols.name: lastEntryTick
symbols.detail: [OK] Module-level Map initialized correctly; scoped to module, cleared via resetSignals.

symbols.name: resetSignals
symbols.detail: [OK] Correctly clears the shared map; no logic issues.

symbols.name: canEnterBlock
symbols.detail: [NEEDS_FIX] Off-by-one: headway enforcement uses MIN_HEADWAY - 1 instead of MIN_HEADWAY, allowing entry one tick too early.

findings.detail: `elapsed >= MIN_HEADWAY - 1` accepts elapsed == MIN_HEADWAY-1, meaning a second train can enter after only (MIN_HEADWAY-1) ticks have passed. The constant is named MIN_HEADWAY and the threshold should be `elapsed >= MIN_HEADWAY`. With MIN_HEADWAY=3 (per README), the code enforces a 2-tick gap rather than the required 3-tick gap.

symbols.name: recordEntry
symbols.detail: [OK] Correctly records the entry tick for a block; no logic issues.

actions.description: Change `elapsed >= MIN_HEADWAY - 1` to `elapsed >= MIN_HEADWAY` in canEnterBlock (line 14) to correctly enforce the minimum headway.

doc_divergences.reference_excerpt: The minimum headway between two trains entering the same block is 3 ticks.
doc_divergences.observed_behavior: Condition `elapsed >= MIN_HEADWAY - 1` permits a second train to enter after MIN_HEADWAY-1 (2) ticks, one tick short of the documented 3-tick minimum.
